acceptanceCriteria: New tests live under tests/integration/ (e.g. test_tiktok_sandbox_oauth.py, test_tiktok_sandbox_webhook.py)
Tests skip when TIKTOK_APP_KEY / TIKTOK_APP_SECRET are unset
CI secrets configured in GitHub Actions so tests run on PRs
One behavior per test (token exchange success, invalid signature rejection, etc.)
No secrets committed to source control

resolvedDecisions.decision: Invalid-auth-code live test runs with app key/secret only; exchange/refresh tests require optional single-use CI secrets

## Out of scope
- Fujiwa polling E2E (#367), Layer 2 sandbox writes (#301)
